channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Chair flytipped by penpoll and wilton, 17th April
item.description:
Chair flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Penpoll Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Tree is growing around electrical wire, 17th April
item.description:
Wire is likely to be affected by the tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maberley Road, Elmers End, Greater London

item.title: Household flammable items flytipped outside housing, 17th April
item.description:
Household flammable items flytipped outside housing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckway Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned motorcycle over a month now, 17th April
item.description:
The above pictured motorcycle has been abandoned outside of our property for over a month now and is a hindrance and eyesore to the neighbourhood. We would be greatful if it could be collected. The Police have been notified but they have replied stating this is a local council issue. Any help or advice would be greatly appreciated. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87a, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fox hit by a bus, 17th April
item.description:
Dead fox near the Downtown Bus stop. Hit by a bus near the curb
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter scattered along the footpath, 17th April
item.description:
Litter scattered along the footpath And around the cars after bin day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heap of tarmac and paving slabs, 17th April
item.description:
This has been left in the road since Tuesday? No work was done in this location as far as I am aware.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown tree, 17th April
item.description:
Tree is blocking our light and branches, seeds and leaves overwhelm our property and garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, The Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Old beds and chairs left in front garden, 17th April
item.description:
Beds and armchair left in front garden. Not being disposed of.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hinstock Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rat infestation, 17th April
item.description:
Rat infestation by recycling bins /food bin, within Lingfield house , just watching rats running around with kids playing it disgusting and a serious health hazard, running under bins and in grassed areas needs to be a priority,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped overnight, 17th April
item.description:
Black sacs of general household waste were dumped outside 255 queens Road Peckham. It got cleared, however there is still lots of rubbish leftover and it’s blowing all over the surrounding area including Pomeroy street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 255, Pomeroy Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden gate, loose bits of wood, stones amd plastoc, 17th April
item.description:
This showed up a few weeks ago and has been there since it hasnt come from amyone on this close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Franklin Close, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose railing overlooking the river right next to pier URGRNT, 17th April
item.description:
URGENT repair neccesery lots of members of public are nearby by the Uber board boarding westbound upper pier

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King William Walk, East Greenwich, Greater London
